expectations.text: Toggle does NOT use useEffect to call onChange/onToggle after state change
expectations.evidence: No useEffect used for parent notification

expectations.text: onChange is called in the same event handler as setIsOn (or component is fully controlled)
expectations.evidence: Found event handler pattern with both state update and parent callback

expectations.text: Component is either fully controlled or updates parent in the click handler (not via Effect)
Includes both Toggle component and a parent component demonstrating the communication pattern
